title: SRS Repository Manifest (ext:repository)
description: Root file for a SRS ext:repository. Acts as the authoritative index and entry point for the repository. Every repository must have exactly one manifest.json at its root.

conformance.description: Space-separated list of SRS extensions this repository conforms to. Must include 'SRS 2.0 Core' and 'ext:repository'.

repositoryId.description: Matches the containerId of the embedded Container. Stable for the lifetime of the repository.

container.description: Embedded Container record. Canonical source of truth for this repository's identity.

packageRef.description: Reference to the SRS Package that supplies field and type definitions.

instanceIndex.description: Authoritative list of all instances in this repository. Every instance file must have an entry here.

relationsPath.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the relations collection file.

sourceDocumentsPath.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the source-documents/ directory.

sourceDocumentIndex.description: Optional explicit index of source documents. When present, implementations may use this for discovery instead of scanning for *.meta.json files (Invariant 52).

relationsChecksums.description: Optional checksums for each relations file declared in relationsPath. Enables fast no-op detection during re-import.

federationPath.description: ext:federation only. Path to the RepositoryRegistry file. Default when absent: 'federation/registry.json'.

federationEventsPath.description: ext:federation only. Path to the FederationEventsFile. Default when absent: 'federation/events.json'.

aiGuidance.description: Comprehension guidance for AI agents reading this repository.

summary.description: Plain-language description of what this repository is about.

suggestedEntryPoints.description: Relative paths to files an AI agent should read first to understand the repository.

navigationHints.description: Guidance on how to traverse the instanceIndex and relations to answer questions.

rootInstanceIds.description: Top-level instances this Container was created to hold.

memberInstanceIds.description: Explicit membership list for all instances in scope.

mode.description: 'local': definitions live in the repository under package/. 'external': definitions are expected pre-installed in the consumer's registry.

path.description: Relative path to package.json (local mode). Default: 'package/package.json'.

packageName.description: Human-readable name of the external package (external mode).

packageVersion.description: Semver of the external package (external mode).

path.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the instance file.

title.description: Denormalised title for quick display without loading the instance file.

typeId.description: For Tier 1 and Tier 2 instances: the typeId of the Type used.

checksum.description: Digest of the instance file: '<algorithm>:<hex>'. E.g. 'sha256:4b2c...'. Enables fast no-op detection during re-import (Invariant 55).

sidecarPath.description: Relative path from sourceDocumentsPath to the .meta.json sidecar.

contentPath.description: Relative path from sourceDocumentsPath to the content file.

title.description: Denormalised for display; not authoritative over the sidecar.
